ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion data entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the device that collected the data */,
  "epoc_ms" TEXT /* Epoch time in milliseconds when the data was recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded data in human-readable format */,
  "elapsed_s" REAL /* Elapsed time since the start of data collection in seconds */,
  "x_axis" REAL /* Acceleration on the x-axis in g */,
  "y_axis" REAL /* Acceleration on the y-axis in g */,
  "z_axis" REAL /* Acceleration on the z-axis in g */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the device at the time of data collection */,
  "location_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location where the data was collected */,
  "location_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location where the data was collected */,
  "location_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the location data */,
  "step_count" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the data collection interval */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate at the time of data collection (if supported by the device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the wearable device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was purchased */,
  "battery_capacity" INTEGER /* Total battery capacity of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "last_sync_time" TEXT /* Last time the device was synchronized with the platform */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensors available on the device (e.g., GPS, heart rate monitor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered on the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the user (e.g., sedentary, active, very active) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user associated with the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walking, running, resting) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Estimated calories burned during the activity */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance traveled during the activity in kilometers */,
  "heart_rate_avg" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "heart_rate_max" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate during the activity */,
  "heart_rate_min" INTEGER /* Minimum heart rate during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user associated with the analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the motion data analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., normal, alert) */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., anomaly detection, trend analysis) */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Name of the tool or algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score indicating the reliability of the analysis result */,
  "anomaly_score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of an anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, edit_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
